title: Deadfast Mouse & Rat Killer Plus 6 Grain Bait, Black
features: Fast action spring door for efficient trapping
Optimum bait pedal position for a safe catch
Also catches mice, squirrels and other small animals
description: Product Description Deadfast Mouse and Rat Killer Plus Grain is an innovative rodenticide that kills in a single dose and highly effective even on high infestations. Its cereal-based, grain formula is the closest form of bait for mice and rats to their diet for effective uptake. It is best used around outbuildings, outcompeting any stored or spilled pet or bird feed that pests may be feeding from. Safety Warning Deadfast Mouse and Rat Killer Plus Grain contains Difethialone. Use biocides products safely. Always read the label and product information before use.
